tinyv-2025.one_line_summary_ch: TinyV 用轻量级学习型验证器找回规则数学验证器漏判的正确答案，从而改善 RLVR 训练奖励。
tinyv-2025.paper_type_ch: 验证器错误修正 / RLVR 奖励论文
tinyv-2025.best_for_ch: 适合关注 RLVR、数学验证器、奖励建模和 verifier 审计的读者。
tinyv-2025.confidence_ch: 高（官方链接已核验，训练细节仍需复核）
tinyv-2025.authors_ch: Zhangchen Xu, Yuetai Li, Fengqing Jiang, Bhaskar Ramasubramanian, Luyao Niu, Bill Yuchen Lin, Radha Poovendran

agnostics-universal-learning-environment.one_line_summary_ch: Agnostics 把代码任务改写成通用 I/O 验证环境，让不同编程语言都能用同一类程序化奖励做 RLVR。
agnostics-universal-learning-environment.paper_type_ch: 代码 RLVR / 通用程序验证环境论文
agnostics-universal-learning-environment.best_for_ch: 适合关注代码强化学习、低资源编程语言、执行型 verifier 和可复用训练环境的读者。
agnostics-universal-learning-environment.authors_ch: Aleksander Boruch-Gruszecki, Yangtian Zi, Zixuan Wu, Tejas Oberoi, Carolyn Jane Anderson, Joydeep Biswas, Arjun Guha

featurebench-2026.one_line_summary_ch: FeatureBench 用仓库单元测试自动构造可执行的 feature-level 编程任务，用来评测 agentic coding 能力。
featurebench-2026.paper_type_ch: 可执行代码 Agent benchmark / 软件工程评测论文
featurebench-2026.best_for_ch: 适合关注 SWE agent、代码评测、unit-test 生成任务和 benchmark 防泄漏的读者。
featurebench-2026.authors_ch: Qixing Zhou, Jiacheng Zhang, Haiyang Wang, Rui Hao, Jiahe Wang, Minghao Han, Yuxue Yang, Shuzhe Wu, Feiyang Pan, Lue Fan, Dandan Tu, Zhaoxiang Zhang

beyondbench-2026.one_line_summary_ch: BeyondBench 用算法生成新题并进行确定性验证，降低静态 benchmark 被训练数据污染的风险。
beyondbench-2026.paper_type_ch: 抗污染推理评测 / 程序化验证 benchmark
beyondbench-2026.best_for_ch: 适合关注 benchmark contamination、算法题生成、数学验证和评测可靠性的读者。
beyondbench-2026.authors_ch: Gaurav Srivastava, Aafiya Hussain, Zhenyu Bi, Swastik Roy, Priya Pitre, Meng Lu, Morteza Ziyadi, Xuan Wang

credit-budgeted-icpc-style-coding-2026.one_line_summary_ch: 这篇把 ICPC 风格代码 agent 评测放进信用预算机制里，让 token、测试和时间都成为可审计成本。
credit-budgeted-icpc-style-coding-2026.paper_type_ch: 预算约束代码 Agent benchmark / test-time compute 评测论文
credit-budgeted-icpc-style-coding-2026.best_for_ch: 适合关注代码 agent、资源约束评测、test-time compute 和程序化 judge 的读者。
credit-budgeted-icpc-style-coding-2026.authors_ch: Lingfeng Zhou, Junhao Shi, Jin Gao, Dequan Wang

geogrambench-2026.one_line_summary_ch: GeoGramBench 评测模型能否理解程序化绘图代码中的几何空间信息，并回答抽象几何问题。
geogrambench-2026.paper_type_ch: 几何程序推理 benchmark / symbolic-to-spatial 评测论文
geogrambench-2026.best_for_ch: 适合关注几何推理、程序表示、空间理解和 benchmark 设计的读者。
geogrambench-2026.authors_ch: Shixian Luo, Zezhou Zhu, Yu Yuan, Yuncheng Yang, Lianlei Shan, Yong Wu

scaling-llm-test-time-compute-optimally-.one_line_summary_ch: 这篇把 test-time compute 当作可分配预算来研究，直接比较 best-of-N、verifier search 和模型规模扩展。
scaling-llm-test-time-compute-optimally-.paper_type_ch: test-time compute scaling / verifier search 论文
scaling-llm-test-time-compute-optimally-.best_for_ch: 适合关注推理预算、best-of-N、verifier-guided search 和 scaling attribution 的读者。
scaling-llm-test-time-compute-optimally-.confidence_ch: 高（原文链接已核验，会议归属需复核）
scaling-llm-test-time-compute-optimally-.authors_ch: Charlie Snell, Jaehoon Lee, Kelvin Xu, Aviral Kumar

self-consistency-chain-of-thought-2023.one_line_summary_ch: Self-Consistency 把多次 CoT 采样和答案投票变成最基础的 test-time compute baseline。
self-consistency-chain-of-thought-2023.paper_type_ch: CoT repeated sampling / test-time compute 论文
self-consistency-chain-of-thought-2023.best_for_ch: 适合关注 pass@k、采样预算、best-of-N 和 CoT 评测基线的读者。
self-consistency-chain-of-thought-2023.authors_ch: Xuezhi Wang, Jason Wei, Dale Schuurmans, Quoc Le, Ed Chi, Sharan Narang, Aakanksha Chowdhery, Denny Zhou

tree-of-thoughts-2023.one_line_summary_ch: Tree of Thoughts 把 CoT 扩展成显式树搜索，让分支数、评估器和回溯都成为 test-time compute 记录。
tree-of-thoughts-2023.paper_type_ch: 树搜索 / test-time compute scaffold 论文
tree-of-thoughts-2023.best_for_ch: 适合关注 search trace、branch budget、self-evaluation 和 agent scaffold 的读者。
tree-of-thoughts-2023.authors_ch: Shunyu Yao, Dian Yu, Jeffrey Zhao, Izhak Shafran, Thomas L. Griffiths, Yuan Cao, Karthik Narasimhan

coderl-code-generation-rl-2022.one_line_summary_ch: CodeRL 用单元测试和 critic 作为代码生成奖励，并在推理时用反馈驱动 critical sampling。
coderl-code-generation-rl-2022.paper_type_ch: 代码 RL / 程序化 verifier 论文
coderl-code-generation-rl-2022.best_for_ch: 适合关注 code RLVR、unit-test reward、critic verifier 和 pass@k 预算的读者。
coderl-code-generation-rl-2022.authors_ch: Hung Le, Yue Wang, Akhilesh Deepak Gotmare, Silvio Savarese, Steven C. H. Hoi

lets-verify-step-by-step-2023.one_line_summary_ch: 这篇用 PRM800K 说明 step-level process supervision 可以训练更强的数学过程验证器。
lets-verify-step-by-step-2023.paper_type_ch: 过程监督 / PRM verifier 数据论文
lets-verify-step-by-step-2023.best_for_ch: 适合关注 verifier scaling、PRM、step-level reward 和数学 RLVR 审计的读者。
lets-verify-step-by-step-2023.authors_ch: Hunter Lightman, Vineet Kosaraju, Yura Burda, Harri Edwards, Bowen Baker, Teddy Lee, Jan Leike, John Schulman, Ilya Sutskever, Karl Cobbe

deepseekmath-2024.one_line_summary_ch: DeepSeekMath 同时展示 math data scaling、GRPO/RLVR 和 64-sample self-consistency 对数学推理的贡献。
deepseekmath-2024.paper_type_ch: 数学 RLVR / 数据规模 / GRPO 技术报告
deepseekmath-2024.best_for_ch: 适合关注 math corpus 构造、GRPO、RLVR 优化和采样预算的读者。
deepseekmath-2024.authors_ch: Zhihong Shao, Peiyi Wang, Qihao Zhu, Runxin Xu, Junxiao Song, Xiao Bi, Haowei Zhang, Mingchuan Zhang, Y. K. Li, Y. Wu, Daya Guo

rest-em-self-training-2024.one_line_summary_ch: ReST-EM 研究如何用可验证任务的二值反馈反复生成、过滤并复用模型自己的解题数据。
rest-em-self-training-2024.paper_type_ch: 自训练 / 数据复用 / verifier filtering 论文
rest-em-self-training-2024.best_for_ch: 适合关注 synthetic data reuse、rejection sampling 和可验证反馈自训练的读者。
